feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO can be tagged as delivery complete or final invoice
entry.content: PO can be tagged as delivery complete or final invoice though GR/IR is not equal or there's still discrepancies between GR and IR

entry.title: MD01/02/03 Default setting and check values
entry.content:
I have seen that there are a few questions about the same theme....

Sorry. 

But I have the requirement that the default values in different SAP-Transaction (Old Gui :-)) shout be changed. 

A few of the values are hardcoded in e. G. MM61XO20_INIT_D0150 in MODULE INIT_D0150 OUTPUT: 
    MOVE CHAR1   TO RM61X-DISER.

I have also read that there ist Transaction SHD0. But this way doesn't work by me. 
Also is a way to say the user - bevore you work - pleas save the settings in the transaciton (beause the user can save them in the Menu)...
But this is not a secure way....

Is there a way to make an enhancement to set the default values? I think that that is also cracy - how I am sure I have realized it in every Transaktion where I need them...

There is also the requirement - how cann we check - that the user has not changed the input-values. Or can we change the input-fields to only output, that the user can´t change them...

A Alternative solution can be to write the table UMD01 (Default Values for mrp). Than use an Enhancement way if there is an update / write bei User-IDOC. 

If it is necessary - we have S4Hana on Premise - SAP S/4HANA 2023. 

I am very curious to see what possible solutions exist and which ones other have chosen / preffered.

entry.title: Transaction KS03 - auto suggestion
entry.content:
I think in Transaction KS03 if i type in a few characters there is coming a auto match list. Perhaps is the reason for the list the search help KOST? 
Can I change the match list per enhancement solution. 
How ist the way? There is a special solution. E. G there should only seen active and from the date valid lines...

Thank you for solution tips.

entry.title: WBS Not Fetching IN GRN
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

While we are performing G.I. 221 "Q" wrt to the reservation then system is PICKING ALL THE DETAILS EXPECT  THE WBS element. Hence this became so hactic for us.

entry.title: I cannot record page down keys in LSMW recording for updating depreciation keys via AS02
entry.content:
I am using LSMW to update new intervals for depreciation areas, and there are over 16 depreciation keys to update. However, I cannot add the page down command in the LSMW recording. It always captures BDC_OKCODE = /00 instead of =P+ or =P++. I want to know how to record the page down in LSMW for this case.

Behavior when we update BDC_OKCODE =P+ that screen will come out of interval added and back to screen of depreciation area.

How we can record via LSMW for this case?

#AS02

#LSMW

#

entry.title: User is not able to perform TECO, getting error message: System status XSez is active (ORD 811681)
entry.content: User is not able to perform TECO, getting error message: System status XSez is active (ORD 811681). Normally they discard the PIsheets, remove the Xsteps in the process order & it will TECO.

entry.title: user can not delete the inbound delivery, it shows
entry.content:
user can not delete the inbound delivery, it shows the confirmation cannot be deleted

Message no. ME635

entry.title: How to disable fields in Location Tab And Additional Data tab in IW32/Change Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day!

I would like to disable/grey out Cost Center and WBS fields in Location Tab and Additional Data Tab and add some logic for settlement rule when accessing IW32/Change Maintenance Order for released orders.
I have tried the following:
- Check for customer exits
- Check for screen exit
- Check for BADI
- Check for Implicit Enhancement.

However, I was not able to find suitable solution for our client requirement.
Your insights are greatly appreciated.

Best Regards,
JB

entry.title: After Retirement asset is calculating Depreciation
entry.content:
We see after the retirement or scrapped the NBV value is positive and asset is charging depreciation on the following months.

Asset number : 2100000504 , 2100000425 

Company Code : PM00

Ideally after the Retirement this should not charge any depreciation.

entry.title: Storage Location Field Not Populating via Inbound ORDERS IDoc (ORDERS05) in QR1
entry.content:
We are currently experiencing an issue with sales order creation triggered by our external system. The inbound data is successfully received in SAP ECC via IDoc using message type ORDERS and basic type ORDERS05 in QR1.

Issue Description:
Although the storage location information is correctly populated within the incoming IDoc segments (as shown in the attached screenshot), the Storage Location (LGORT) field remains blank on the generated sales order line items.

 

To help us diagnose the root cause, could you please verify the following areas:

  • Segment Mapping: Confirm if the storage location value from the external system is mapped to the correct IDoc field E1EDP01 - LGORT

Could you please investigate this behavior and let us know why the storage location is failing to update?

entry.title: Starting Nov 2026, Town Name and Country are conditional mandatory fields for Wire payments,
entry.content: Starting Nov 2026, Town Name and Country are conditional mandatory fields for Wire payments, meaning if address is provided, then “Town Name” and “Country” become mandatory fields, as attached the example to the case.

entry.title: Clarification on Standard Processing of Multiple DELFOR IDocs
entry.content:
The sender system (Infineon) and the receiver system (Bosch) are both SAP systems.

Infineon sends Supplier Confirmations for the same Scheduling Agreement in two separate DELFOR IDocs (one containing Firm schedule lines and another containing Forecast schedule lines) in DELFOR D.97A/D.04A format.

We would like to understand the standard SAP behavior for processing these multiple inbound DELFOR IDocs. Specifically, how should SAP process Supplier Confirmations received in separate IDocs for the same Scheduling Agreement.

Expectation:

 

Is there any standard SAP functionality to merge or aggregate multiple inbound DELFOR IDocs into a single Supplier Confirmation before updating the Scheduling Agreement (EKES)? If yes, please provide the standard program, function module, class, or processing logic responsible for this scenario.

 

If no such standard functionality exists, please advise the recommended SAP standard approach for processing Supplier Confirmations received in multiple DELFOR IDocs for the same Scheduling Agreement.

entry.title: Splitting Input Tax per Cost Object
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our management request SAP system to automate journal Service Import Tax as

Debit Expense Account Import Service Tax (PnL)

Credit Accrual Account Import Service Tax (BS)

For GL accounts are populated correctly as per setup Tax configuration, however the splitting for line Expense Account Import Service Tax with source Cost Object is not working. 

Expectation as below:

Posting Key Account Account DescriptionTax CodeAmount WBSCost Center
31100011VendorS3-1,500.00  
40A4407010Legal ConsultancyS3500 Cost Center
40A6214010Consultancies FeesS31,000.00WBS 
50A2202101Service Tax - MYS3-120  
40A7000000ISTS340 Cost Center
40A7000000ISTS380WBS 

Appreciate for any input and advice

 

Regards,

Eva

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01 Fully-Activated Appliance
entry.content: Could anyone help provide a Baidu Netdisk download link for SAP S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01 Fully-Activated Appliance? My S-User account does not have download permissions. Thanks！

entry.title: Message no. KD031 : Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to create a sales order but getting below error, 

Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender

Please refer attached documentation for your reference.

Best Regards,

Praveen R

entry.title: In the PO under the Conditions tab, the PBXX price cannot be edited for a few POs
entry.content: In the PO under the Conditions tab, the PBXX price cannot be edited for a few POs, even after the GR and Invoice processes are completed

entry.title: User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data.
entry.content:
User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data 30000708 & 30000710.

in C01 /100 system, for company code 3806 Could you check and let us know you advise on this.

we have similar issue in C02/100 as well 30000667

Thank you

entry.title: Depreciation posting not completed due to missing Cost center in Asset Master
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Issue details: User created Asset with out Cost center. And posted acquisition And performed depreciation run Asset got posted depreciation but not in General ledger.

System C01/100, Company cod 3806, Asset No 30000708, COD-MIN

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: VA05 Report getting duplicate entries
entry.content:
Dear Team,

in VA05 Standard report ,We are getting  Duplicate entries.

due to this duplicate entries we are not getting proper report.

Thanks
